title: ASDD Project Registry
description: Authoritative list of ASDD projects on this host. Single source of truth for the kernel's project router. Hot-reloadable; invalid file keeps the previously-loaded copy.

default_project_id.description: Project ID assumed for inbox notes / schedule entries that omit project_id.

id.description: Stable, never renamed. Used as the directory name under ${ASDD_HOME}/projects/.

name.description: Human-readable label. May change without re-indexing past artifacts.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the project's on-disk workspace.

git_remote.description: URL of the canonical Git remote, if any.

default_branch.description: Branch protected from destructive ops by default.

description.description: One-line summary surfaced in the platform dashboard.
